title: Context Scope
description: A named context boundary that agents or skills may request.

version.description: Specification version of this context definition.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this context scope.

description.description: Public-safe description of the context available through this scope.

dataClassification.description: Highest expected data classification available through the scope.

allowedPurpose.description: Permitted business purposes for this context scope.

sourceSystems.description: System identifiers that may provide this context.
